case_title: BETTA JIA-XING LIANG VS. JOHNSON JIN PIAO LUO

docket_entries.description: APPL & DECLARATION FOR ORDER PROHIBITING DOMESTIC VIOLENCE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE-DOMESTIC VIOLENCE, CALENDAR MOTION: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE, CALENDAR MOTION: TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER HEARING SET FOR NOV-01-2000 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 404

PERSONALLY SERVED WITH NOTICE FROM PREVIOUS HEARING. PET SWORN AND TESTIFIED. COURT ORDERS 3YR STANDARD CONDUCT RO WITH 100 YARD STAY AWAY AGAINST
ION/RELINQUISHMENT (WITHIN 48 HOURS) APPLIES. COURT ALLOWS PET TO MAKE ARRANGEMENTS FOR CIVIL STANDBY TO RETRIEVE HER PERSONAL BELONGINGS FROM RESP'S
